case_title: GARCIA, SALVADOR vs. FRITSCH, JANEY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, SALVADOR AS TO DEFENDANT FRITSCH, JANEY DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-12-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-14-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-25-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON AUG-19-1997, SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY LEON JORGE E PORTUGAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-03-1997 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-12-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IF NOT PAID BY 9-3-97. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY LEON JORGE E PORTUGAL. HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, FOR DISMISSAL HEARING SET FOR DEC-10-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
